title: BSNC Announces 2024 Annual Meeting Election Results
summary: BSNC Announces 2024 Annual Meeting Election Results BSNC held its 2024 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Saturday, Oct. 5 in Nome, Alaska at the Nome Recreation Center.
